titleStmt.title: SII 34.234: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 234. Tiruvēngavāsal, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa, in front of the central shrine in the Vyāghrapurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājēndra I, 26th year = A.D. 1038.

Gift of land, freed from taxes, by the sabhā of Tiruvēṅgaivāyil, a dēvadāna in Peruvāyil-nāḍu in Jayasiṅgakulakāla-vaḷanāḍu for offerings to the image of Nittachūḷāmaṇi-Viḍaṅgar. A local Brāhmaṇa called Māḍalaṉ Nārāyaṇaṉ Mahādēvaṉ alias Dharmishṭhayōgi got the land tax-free by paying the tax capital to the sabhā. The ūrār of Vallakkūṟṟuvar was present on the occasion of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyaṟpāvaiyuñ cīrttaṉic celviyuntaṉperuntEviyarāki Iṉpuṟu neṭuntuyilūḻi Ūḻiyuḷḷiṭai tuṟai nāṭu
tuṭarvaṉa vēlip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷi cūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraicar tam muṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ tēviyarōṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavaṉ pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉāramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻutum Eṟipaṭaik kēraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyum caṅkatir vēlaittol
peruṅkāval pala paḻantīvum ceruvil ciṉavil Irupattorukāl Araicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mēvaruñ cātti maṟṟīvaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻi mika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭo
Ilakkamum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkirama vīrac cakkarakkōṭṭamum mutiravaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmaṭai vaḷaka nāmaṇaikkōṇaiyum veñcilai vīrappañcappaḷḷiyu
m pācaṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇi tēcamum Ayarvil vaṇ kīrtti Ātinakar Avaiyil cantiraṉ tolkulat tintiraṉai viḷai Amar kaḷattu kiḷaiyōṭum piṭittu palataṉattōṭu niṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñce
ṟimiḷai Oṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcurarcērnalk kōcalai nāṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉai Aḻittu vaṇṭuṟai cōlait taṇṭaputtiyum raṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākki tikkaṇa kīrtti takkaṇalāṭamum kōvinta cantaṉ māvi
ḻintōṭa taṅkāta cāyal vaṅkāḷa tēcamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkuvoṭṭa mayilpālaṉai veñcama viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittala neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tīrtta
ceṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭanaṭuvil palakalañcelutti caṅkirāma vicaiyattuṅka paṉmarākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayap porukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyōṭu Akappaṭut turimayil piṟakkiya peṟu netippiṟakkamum Ārttava ṉakaṉakar pōrttoḻil vā
calil viccātiratōraṇamum Ottoḷir puṉai maṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikka tavamum niṟai śrīvijaiyamum tuṟainīr paṉṉaiyum vaṉmalaiyūraiyiṟ ṟoṉmalai Ūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiriṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāval viṉai [ I
laṅkāvalviṉai] Ilaṅkācōpamum kāppuṟu tiṟaipuṉal māpappāḷamum kāvaliṉ puricai mēvaliṉpaṅkamum viṉaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟum kalaittakkōr pukaḻttalait takkōlamum titamāvalviṉai mā tama
liṅkamum kaṭuntiṟal Iṉamuri tēcamum tēṉakkavār poḻil māṉak kavāramum toṭukaṭal kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kōpparakēcari panmarāna Uṭaiyār śrī rājēntratēvaṟku yāṇṭu [2 100 6]
Āvatu jayaciṅkakulakāla vaḷanāṭṭu peruvāyil nāṭṭu tēvatāṉam tiruvēṅkaivāyil sabhaiyōm śivaprāhmaṇarkaḷ vallakkūṟṟuvarāṉa Ūrōmum Ivvaṉaivōm Iva
ṉa nārāyaṇaṉ mahādevaṉṉāṉa dharmmiṣṭhayōgikku Ivūr sabhaiyōm Uṭaiyār nitta cūḷāmaṇi viṭaṅkaruṭaiya ma ku tiruvamutukku Ivvūr sabhaiyōm ṭaiya sabhai
nīrōṭaṭṭik kuṭutta sabhaiyār vayalukku Iṟaikāvalukku Ivvūr māṭalaṉ nārāyaṇaṉ mahādevaṉṉāṉa dharmmiṣṭhayō[ giyi] ṭai koṇṭa [ kācu 4 10 1] Ikkācu nāṟpattoṉṟuṅ koṇṭu cantrātittavarai Iṟaiyili
yār kuḷattukkum vayalukkum puṉceykaḷukkum Ellaiyāvitu kīḻpār kellai tiruvēṅkaivāyil kuḷattukku talaikkum civa brāhmaṇar cuṭukāṭṭuppuṉ ceykkum mēkkum
llai Ittiruvēṅkaivāyil kuḷattukku vaṭakkum mēpāṟkellai vaṭakku nōkkippoṉa vaḻi ṭaṉ nattattukkum vaṭa ya vayalukku kkiḻakkum
llai teṟṟoṭu ceykkum Ellai kallai kalloṭu kaṇṭu
Digital edition of SII 34.234 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
